name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12746 Blue] This Victorine wallet is made of Monogram canvas, incorporating functional elements with a soft and graceful style. It features card slots and pockets for storing paper money and coins. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)
